behaviors.behavior: F1: phase_session_start.main() engages the claim lifecycle from the stdin payload with NO env vars set
F1: phase_user_prompt_validate.main() consumes the block sentinel + blocks from the payload alone
F1: main() degrades to standalone (exit 0, no crash) when the payload cwd is not a Shipwright project
F1: read_hook_payload tolerant parse (valid / empty / whitespace / malformed / non-object / read-error)
F1: resolve_session_id (payload wins, env fallback, None, blank, non-string)
F1: resolve_project_root_from_payload (env override, env-ignored-non-project, payload cwd, resolver fallback, ambiguous->None)
F15: record_event accepts phase_failed and the event lands in the log
F15: record_event accepts stale_stop_rejected and the event lands in the log
F15: phase_failed / stale_stop_rejected are NOT phase-deduped (diagnostics may recur)
F15 end-to-end: phase_session_stop.main() on a failed phase records phase_failed (previously dropped on argparse exit 2)
F14: append_event_idempotent appends a new event when no duplicate exists
F14: append_event_idempotent skips a duplicate phase_completed
F14: append_event_idempotent skips a duplicate by-commit work_completed when the flag is set
F14: the dedup scan runs INSIDE the _FileLock (deterministic inject-on-lock-entry proof)
F14: no duplicate phase_completed under 8-way concurrent record_event subprocesses
Composition: hook stdin-resolution + phase_task_lifecycle + record_event compose end-to-end (start.main()->stop.main()->phase_completed lands)
Downstream consumers tolerate the newly-appearing phase_failed/stale_stop_rejected event types (positive type filters; no closed type enum)
behaviors.reason: every events.jsonl consumer (generate_session_handoff, update_build_dashboard, _triage_bundle, verifiers/common, validate_event_log) filters type=='phase_completed' positively / requires only {v,id,ts,type}; pinned by the existing consumer suites which stay green (full shared suite 3348 passed)

surface_verification.justification: No startable web/UI/API surface in the diff: Claude-Code phase-session hook plumbing (stdin-payload identity resolution, F1) + the record_event CLI event-log writer (F14 atomic dedup, F15 failure types). The user-erlebbar surface (v2 pipeline lifecycle) is driven end-to-end by integration-tests/test_phase_hook_main_lifecycle.py (each hook main() via a realistic stdin payload with env cleared, claim->validate->complete, plus failure/dedup paths through record_event incl. an 8-way concurrent subprocess dedup test). The monorepo has no dev_server; the Command Center WebUI is a separate repo and the new event types are additive (consumers use positive type filters, boundary-probed).
